svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='340' height='90'><line x1='30' y1='45' x2='310' y2='45' stroke='black' stroke-width='2'/><g stroke='black' stroke-width='2'><line x1='30' y1='40' x2='30' y2='50'/><line x1='100' y1='40' x2='100' y2='50'/><line x1='170' y1='40' x2='170' y2='50'/><line x1='240' y1='40' x2='240' y2='50'/><line x1='310' y1='40' x2='310' y2='50'/></g><circle cx='240' cy='45' r='6' fill='black'/><g font-family='Arial' font-size='14' text-anchor='middle'><text x='30' y='75'>0</text><text x='310' y='75'>1</text></g></svg>

description: Triangle with a median drawn from the top vertex to the base midpoint.
svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='260' height='190'><polygon points='60,160 200,160 130,50' fill='none' stroke='black' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='130' y1='50' x2='130' y2='160' stroke='black' stroke-width='2' stroke-dasharray='5,4'/><circle cx='130' cy='160' r='3' fill='black'/></svg>

description: Two intersecting circles (a Venn diagram outline).

description: Simple bar chart with three bars (heights 3,5,2).
svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='260' height='180'><g stroke='black' stroke-width='2' fill='none'><line x1='30' y1='150' x2='240' y2='150'/><line x1='30' y1='30' x2='30' y2='150'/></g><g fill='rgba(0,0,0,0.25)'><rect x='60' y='90' width='35' height='60'/><rect x='115' y='50' width='35' height='100'/><rect x='170' y='110' width='35' height='40'/></g></svg>

description: Coordinate axes with a point plotted.
Square split by both diagonals (an X).

description: Two parallel lines cut by a transversal (no labels).

description: Circle with a chord and a radius to the chord midpoint.

description: Rectangle split into 5 equal parts, 2 shaded.

description: L-shaped polyomino made of 4 unit squares.

description: A simple tree diagram with two branches each splitting into two.

description: A rectangle with one diagonal and a right angle marker at a corner.
